channel.title: Rep. Greg Murphy Voting Record
channel.description: Daily updates on how Rep. Greg Murphy (NC-03) votes in Congress

item.title: HRES 1142: Voted Aye (with party)
item.description: Murphy voted Aye. Result: Passed. Republicans: 209-0. Democrats: 3-203.

item.title: HRES 1142: Voted Yea (with party)
item.description: Murphy voted Yea. Result: Passed. Republicans: 208-0. Democrats: 0-206.
